title: Tailgate Rear Lock Handle Switch Boot Button 3V0827566 for Audi A4 B9 VW Tiguan Touran Skoda Octavia Superb 2015+
features: Perfect Replacement – Direct-fit replacement for tailgate release switch 3V0827566, designed to match specifications and function seamlessly as your factory boot button.

Compatible Vehicle Models – Suitable for VW Caddy (2016–on), VW Tiguan (2016–on), VW Touran (2016–on), VW Teramont (2018–on), Audi A4 (2016–on), Skoda Octavia (2015–on), Skoda Superb (2015–on), Skoda Yeti (2014–2018), and SEAT Tarraco (2019–on).
Constructed from high-quality ABS plastic and rubber materials for excellent resistance to wear, corrosion, ensuring long-lasting reliability.
Easy Plug & Play Installation – Simply unplug the old boot switch and connect the new one. No modifications, coding, or special tools required – restore normal tailgate operation in minutes.
Reliable Boot Release Function – Provides smooth and responsive tailgate opening every time, helping you regain full boot access and convenience just like the original factory part.
description: Interchange Part Number: 3V0827566, 3V0 827 566, 3VD 827 566, 3VD827566 Fitment: For VW Caddy 2016- For VW Teramont 2018- For VW Tiguan 2016- For VW Touran 2016- For Audi A4 2016- For Skoda Octavia 2015- For Skoda Superb 2015- For Skoda Yeti 2014-2018 For Seat Tarraco 2019- Package Includes: 1x Tailgate Switch
